# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I discussed this contribution before starting substantial work.
- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution.
- [ ] This contribution does not include unauthorized copyrighted/brand material.
- [ ] I understand this does not create automatic compensation/equity.
- [ ] I agree that significant contributions may require CLA acceptance.
- [ ] This PR does not modify licensing/commercial/governance policy unless explicitly requested.

## Notes

Add any testing notes, screenshots, credits or context reviewers should know.
